Container.Name: FarFetched
Container.Overview: FarFetched is a self-hosted browser and paced downloader for free 3D models from Printables, plus a local library organizer for files you have already downloaded from other sources. Browse by category, queue STL/3MF files or whole-model ZIPs, and a background worker saves them to disk at a polite, configurable pace. Authentication is paste-once: drop in your Printables refresh-token cookie under Settings and the app keeps your session alive automatically (you'll only re-paste roughly monthly). Open the WebUI to get started.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Host port for the FarFetched web interface. Change this to any free port you like.

Config.Name: Downloads (models)
Config.Description: Host folder where downloaded models are saved (per-source subfolders: printables/, stlflix/, ...).

Config.Name: App Data (token, db, logs)
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the Printables session token, the SQLite queue, and logs. Keep this stable across updates.

Config.Name: Pace (seconds between files)
Config.Description: Seconds the worker waits between file downloads. 120 is polite; lower at your own risk.

Config.Name: Download Dir (in container)
Config.Description: Where the worker writes inside the container. Leave as /downloads unless you know why you are changing it.
